description_long: This is a small, single-story wooden cabin with a prominent shed-style roof that slopes to one side. The exterior walls are clad in reddish-brown vertical wooden planks, while the lower portion is finished with a blue-gray brick or stone skirting. The front facade features a central door flanked by two large rectangular windows, and a wooden porch with railings and steps leading up to the entrance. The side facades each have a mix of window sizes, including a small grid-patterned window and a larger sliding window, providing ample natural light. The roof is covered in blue-gray shingles and has a wide overhang, offering some protection to the porch and windows. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for residential use in an urban or suburban neighborhood.
description: A compact wooden cabin with a sloped shed roof, large front windows, a central door, and a front porch with railings and steps.
description_view_0: The rear view shows a plain wooden wall with a single small window and no visible entrance or porch.
description_view_1: The left side view displays a mix of window sizes, including a small grid window and a large sliding window, as well as the side of the porch and railing.
description_view_2: The front view highlights the central door, two large windows, and the full width of the porch with steps leading up.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, with a large sliding window and a small grid window, plus the porch extending from the front.
attribute_roof_type: shed roof with a single slope and wide overhang, covered in shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: Asymmetrical arrangement with two large rectangular windows on the front, one small grid-patterned window and one large sliding window on each side, providing a varied and functional window layout
attribute_door_placement: One exterior door centered on the front facade, directly accessible from the porch and flanked by large windows
